name: Brimag Digital Age Ltd.
summary: Brimag Digital Age Ltd. imports, markets, and distributes home appliances and commercial air conditioning systems in Israel. It operates through Commercial Systems Sector and Household Products Sector segments. The company markets household refrigerators, freezers, washing machines, dryers, dishwashers, queues, stoves, etc.; home electronics products, including smart TVs, VR glasses, video cameras, and audio systems; and small electrical appliances, such as vacuum cleaners, coffee makers, microwave ovens, food processors and mixers, wireless telephones, and telephones, toasters, ovens, irons, electric kettles, toiletries, and other products. It also provides warranty, maintenance, and repair services. The company sells its products under the under company-owned brands comprising CHROMEX, GRAETZ LENCO, DRAGON, and HOME. Brimag Digital Age Ltd. was incorporated in 1993 and is based in Azor, Israel.
